announceBar.text: We're open every day 10–4 on Tobin Street.

story.label: Who we are
story.heading: Small room. Big plates. Very Cork.
story.paragraph1: We squeezed ourselves onto Tobin Street and never looked back. Tight menu, serious coffee, and two paperboys keeping watch over the whole thing.
story.paragraph2: No fuss. No pretence. Just the good stuff — served every day from 10 till 4.
story.storefrontQuote: Two faces over the door, and the best reason to leave the house before noon.

menu.label: Bites · Brunch & Sambos · Est. 2023
menu.heading: The menu
menu.introText: Served all day. Allergen numbers in brackets — full key at the foot of the list.
menu.allergenKey: Allergens — 1 Gluten · 2 Crustaceans · 3 Eggs · 4 Fish · 5 Peanuts · 6 Soy · 7 Milk · 8 Nuts · 9 Celery · 10 Mustard · 11 Sesame · 12 Sulphites · 13 Lupin · 14 Molluscs.

dishes.name: Halloumi Florentine
dishes.description: Brioche, halloumi, sautéed spinach, tomato relish, poached eggs.

dishes.name: Avo Smash
dishes.description: Smashed avocado, confit cherry tomatoes, goats cheese and jalapeño on toasted brioche. Add 2 poached eggs €3.

dishes.name: Black Pudding Hash
dishes.description: Squashed baby potatoes, black pudding, caramelised onions, jalapeño salsa and poached eggs.

dishes.name: Rosti Benedict
dishes.description: Potato rosti, slow cooked ham, poached eggs & brown butter hollandaise.

dishes.name: Courgette Fritters
dishes.description: Courgette & chickpea fritters, spiced yogurt, pickles, herb salad & poached eggs.

dishes.name: Maple Bacon French Toast
dishes.description: Double stack of brioche French toast, served with streaky bacon & maple syrup.

dishes.name: Strawberry and Cream French Toast
dishes.description: Cinnamon sugar coated vanilla French toast, Irish strawberries, strawberry Chantilly cream.

dishes.name: Bacon and Egg Roll
dishes.description: Toasted brioche bun, streaky bacon, fried eggs, caramelised onion, cheese and spicy mayo.

dishes.name: Ham and Cheese Toastie
dishes.description: ABC burnt crust bread, slow cooked ham, smoked Irish cheddar, homemade tomato relish.

dishes.name: Bahn Mi
dishes.description: Vietnamese style pork belly, pickled carrot and daikon, fresh chilli, coriander, vietmayo, baguette. Veggie option: crispy chilli garlic tofu.

dishes.name: Mediterranean Baguette
dishes.description: Pesto, roasted peppers, tomato, smoked scamorza and rocket on rustic sourdough baguette. Add roast chicken €3.5.

dishes.name: Korean Fried Chicken Burger
dishes.description: Gochujang glazed fried chicken thigh, homemade spring onion kimchi slaw, on a toasted brioche bun. Add fries €4.

dishes.name: B.R.A.T
dishes.description: Bacon, rocket, avocado, tomato & mayo on toasted ABC loaf. Add fried eggs €3.

sides.name: ABC Burnt Crust Loaf or Brioche

tiles.caption: The counter
tiles.alt: Inside Paperboys — the counter, hanging glassware and coffee board under slatted timber

tiles.caption: Coffee, all day
tiles.alt: A flat white with latte art

tiles.caption: Egg tostadas
tiles.alt: Egg tostadas topped with micro-herbs and salsa

whatson.label: Coming up
whatson.heading: What's On
whatson.note: Follow us on Instagram for the latest specials and pop-ups — we keep things fresh :)

events.title: Daily Brunch
events.description: Full menu on from 10 till 4. Breakfast dishes, sambos, coffee — the whole lot.

events.title: Saturday & Sunday Special
events.description: Weekend plates drop every Saturday and Sunday — something a little extra alongside the usual.

events.title: Pop-up Guests
events.description: We occasionally hand the kitchen over to guest chefs and producers. Watch the Instagram for dates.

soundtrack.label: The vibe
soundtrack.heading: Paperboys HiFi
soundtrack.paragraph1: We've been slowly building a playlist that pretty much runs in the background of everything we do.
soundtrack.paragraph2: Somewhere between soul, jazz, and whatever mood we're in that morning — stick it on.

cards.heading: Private Hire
cards.paragraph: Birthday brunch, work do, family celebration — we take over the whole room for you. Bespoke menu, coffee sorted, as many guests as you want!. You bring the people. Hosting something bigger? We've also got a garden out back available to hire for larger events, giving you the space you need.
cards.sub: More info and shots of the space at the link below.

cards.heading: Events & Pop-ups
cards.paragraph: Looking to host a supper club, pop-up collab or brand activation? We've got the space, the kitchen and the crowd to make it work.
cards.sub: Press the button to see more info and get the conversation started :)

ctaStrip.title: Good plates. Serious coffee.
ctaStrip.subtext: We're on Tobin Street every day — come find us :)
